mnemonics.title: Producer-Consumer Semaphores
mnemonics.explanation: Three semaphores needed: empty (init N), full (init 0), mutex (init 1)

mnemonics.title: Dining Philosophers Solutions
mnemonics.explanation: Three solutions: Asymmetric order, Limit to N-1, Pick both atomically

mnemonics.title: Readers-Writers Variables
mnemonics.explanation: Mutex protects read_count, write_lock gives exclusive access

quickRecall: Producer: wait(empty), wait(mutex), produce, signal(mutex), signal(full)
Consumer: wait(full), wait(mutex), consume, signal(mutex), signal(empty)
Dining Philosophers: Break circular wait with asymmetry
Readers-Writers: First reader locks, last reader unlocks
